titleStmt.title: SII 22.233: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 233. (A.R. No. 233 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPAṈAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE TĀḶAPURĪŚVARA SHRINE. RĀJĀDHIRĀJA I—3[2]nd YEAR (A.D. 1049-50)

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Tiṅgaḷēr taru etc. It registers a sale of land free of all taxes as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili to the temple of Tiruppaṉaṅgāḍuḍaiyār at Vanpākkam in Kāliyūrkōṭṭam by the assembly of Vallūr in Kāyirampēḍu nāḍu in the same kōṭṭam said to be a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam. The details of the transaction are lost in the damaged portion of the record. The cost of the land was probably collectively paid by some persons named in the inscription, as endowment for meeting the expenses of worship in the temple, and for feeding daily four Śivayōgins and tapasvins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅko loccik karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟiya tātai
yun tiruttamaiyaṉaiyuṅ kuṟikkoḷat taṉniḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟiyuṇart taṉṟirupputalvartammaiyuntuṉṟeḻil vāṉavan vallavaṉ miṉavan kaṅkanila
ṅkaikkiṟaivaṉ Oṅkeḻiṟ pallavar kannakucciyar kāvalaneṉap poṉ naṇi cuṭarmaṇi makuṭañcūṭṭip paṭarpukaḻāṅkavarkkavar nāṭaruḷip pāṅkuṟu manṉu pallūḻiyuṭ
ṭeṉnavar muvaruḷ māṉāparaṇan ponmuṭiyāṉāp parumatiṭ pacuntalai porukaḷattarintu vāraḷavip pukaḻ virakeraḷaṉai muṉaivayiṟ piṭittut taṉatatti vāraṇak katakki
ṭak kaḷiṟṟālutaippittaruḷi Antamil perumpukaḻ cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaik kavari
viḻat talaivirittaṭitaḷarntoṭat tollaiyil mullaiyūr turantu Olkalil veṇāṭṭaracaic ce
ṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻirāmakuṭa muvarkeṭa munintu viṭākeḻu villavaṉ kuṭarmaṭikkoṇṭu taṉṉāṭu viṭṭoṭi
k kāṭupukkoḷippa vañciyam putumalar malain=tāṅ kañcalil mekeḻu kāntaḷūrcālai kalamaṟu
ppittā[ha*]vamallaṉu mañcac ceṉṟāṅkavar paṭaiyi lāṅkavan ceṉaiyiṟ caṇṭap
ṭamiḻ kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟaṟ tirutavikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉuṅ karumuraṭ
ripuraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉnāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭonṉār koḷḷip pākkai
yoḷḷeri maṭuppit torutanittaṇṭāṟ porukaṭalilaṅkaiyar komāṉ vikramabhāhu
viṉ parumaṇi makuṭamum muṉṟaṉakkuṭaintu tenṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatu miḻan=taḻu kaṭa
liḻampukkilaṅkecaṉākiya vikramapāṇṭiyaṉ makuṭamu n=taṉatākki koṭu
koṇṭu tecamu n=taṅkaḷutākkik kāneḻilpola cūḻkaṉnakucciyi lāḻkaṭaliḻamñciṟiteṉ
ṟeṇṇik koṅkoḷnāṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅku muṭikavitta vira calāmekaṉ
porkaḷattañci taṉ kāṟkaḷiṟiḻantu kavvaiyiṟṟoṭit taṉ kātaliyoṭu taṉṟavvaiyaippiṭittu
mukkariya Āṅkavamāṉa niṅkutaṟporuṭṭu miṇṭum vantu vāṭṭoḻiliḻantu veṅkaḷattiḻanta ciṅkaḷa
ttaraiyaṉ poṉnaṇimuṭiyuṅ kanṉaravaḻi vanturaik keraḷat taraica ṉākiya cirvalavan makatarācaṉ
Olloḷittaṭa maṇimuṭiyuṅkoṇṭu vaṭapurattirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭaṉ tiṉakara
ṉāraṇaṅ kaṇavati vaṇṭamar teriyal maticūtaṉaneṉ ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai muṉaivayiṟṟuratti vampala
ṟ caḷukkiyar māḷikait takappittiḷakkamil villavar minavar veḻkulaccaḷukkiyar vallavar kocalar va
ṅkaḷar koṅkaṇar cintura rayyaṉar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar mutaliyararaiciṭu tiṟaikaḷu māṟiloṉṟavaniyiṟ kūṟukoḷ
Uyarn=ta ṉānmaṟaiyavarkkukantukoḷak kuṭuttu viśvalokattu viḷaṅkuneṟi Aśvametañ ceytaraicuvi
ṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉuyarn=ta perumpukaṭ kovirājakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 32Āvatu jeyaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūṟkoṭṭattuk kāyirampeṭunāṭṭu vallūr sabhaiyom Ikkoṭṭattu malāṭāṉa vanpākkattil tirup
paṉaṅkāṭuṭaiyār paṇṭārattu Ādidāsacaṇḍeśvararpakkal vilaikoṇṭu Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr
tirukkatavappereriyu mitile nirpāyum nirnilamum kollai viṟpa tarkku kiḻpārkkellai tirukkāmakkoṭṭappuṟamāna puṟampuḷ
ḷellaiykku meṟkkum tenpāṟkellai maṅkala Ellaiykku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Eṅkaḷūrniṉṟum cumaṅkilikkup poṉa peruvaḻikku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āsūri śrīmādhavakramavittaṉ Uḷ ḷiṭṭār kollaikaḷukkut teṟkkum kellai Araiyāṭuḻi Uḷpaṭṭa
māka ceyvitta teṟkkum Iṉṉānkellai Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi pottukku m viṟṟuk
kuṭuttom viṟṟukkuṭutta tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭu tevaṟku [ubhaya]māka kaṟkusa ṇāḻi yarici tiruvamu
taricikkun neyamutukku n=tayiramutukkum civacokikaḷ nālvaṟku n=tapasvi vvai ṟku muṇṇa vamutukkum niman=tam Iṟaiyili
tevatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom ḷapperumān kramavit taṉu ḷapperumāḷ kramavi
ttaṉum Akkumārakramavitta mavittaṉum cci kāḷakramavittaṉum kāñciṟu lāñci Iravai sandhi
makravittaṉum kāñci ko kramavittaṉum ṇakumāra ṉum Āka ṭai muttakaḷapperumā
vilaiyaṟa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Orukālāvatum Irukālāvatum mukkālā vatum viṟṟukkuṭuttom Itu vilaipporuḷ muṟṟumaṟakkoṇṭu
lavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷmāvaṟuti poruṭcilavolai kāṭṭappeṟātatākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Iṟai
kirayadravyamu maṟakkoṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟukkoṭuttom viṟṟuk kuṭutta paricāvatu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattile van=ta Iṟaipa
ponṉum nellu maṟṟuṅ koyilil vācalāṟpon=ta kuṭimai E Iṟuttu Iṉnilam
Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka cantrātittavaṟ cella viṟṟukkuṭuttom vallūr sabhaiyom Iṉnilat nilamum Ikkuṭi
The next line is too much damaged to be read.
Digital edition of SII 22.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
